description_long: This is a medium-sized woven handbag with a structured, trapezoidal silhouette and a single, wide opening at the top. The exterior is crafted from interlaced strips of green, white, and blue material, forming a distinctive checkered and diagonal pattern. The bag features two sturdy, rounded handles attached symmetrically to the top edge, allowing for easy hand or forearm carrying. A small, rounded flap with a button or snap closure is visible at the center of the opening, providing security for the contents. The weave is tight and uniform, giving the bag a semi-rigid form while maintaining a natural, artisanal appearance. The interior is not visible, but the construction suggests it is unlined or minimally lined, typical of woven handbags.
description: A medium-sized, structured woven handbag with a checkered green, white, and blue pattern, two rounded handles, and a central flap closure.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full checkered pattern, both handles, and the central flap closure.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the bag's depth, the thickness of the woven material, and the profile of the handles.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, displaying the woven pattern and both handles without the closure flap detail.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, showing the bag's depth and handle attachment.
materials: woven palm leaf or synthetic fiber
attribute_strap_type: Two short, rounded handles, non-adjustable, attached directly to the top edge of the bag.
attribute_closure_mechanism: Central flap with a button or snap closure located at the top center of the bag.
attribute_pattern: Checkered and diagonal woven pattern in green, white, and blue.
